Agentic App Kit Design — External Reference Stub
==================================================

Provenance
----------
This is a reference stub for the original design brief
"Agentic App Kit Design.txt". The original document pre-dates
the AIGC SDK and is not maintained as a repository artifact.

Status
------
Superseded by AIGC architecture documentation. The design
concepts from the original brief have been incorporated into
the SDK's architecture and roadmap documents.

Canonical AIGC Equivalents
--------------------------
- docs/architecture/AIGC_Architecture_Redesign_and_Roadmap.md
  (redesign decisions, issue tracker, and roadmap)
- PROJECT.md
  (authoritative structural and implementation contract)
- docs/architecture/AIGC_HIGH_LEVEL_DESIGN.md
  (high-level architecture design)

Authoritative Source Index
--------------------------
See docs/reference/AUTHORITATIVE_SOURCES.md for the complete
external artifact mapping.
